name_cn:
Genuine leather
🔥The new Puzzle Hobo is a soft and refined short Napa leather shoulder bag 👜Inspired by the Puzzle bag's rectangular shape and unique geometric lines
Beauty first, quality second, especially the Puzzle hobo's soft leather that is stunning 🎀Luo's hobo colors are super nice, stylish and versatile, cool yet sweet, truly amazing, I love it😻Classic Napa leather, soft and delicate to the touch~Geometric design is really durable, a bag you can carry for a long time ❤️Short shoulder strap, one external zip pocket and one internal pocket ✨Leather zip puller with D-ring to connect personalized charms 🔗Herringbone cotton canvas Anagram embossing 🛍️
Size: 28CM~10CM~5.5CM
Style No.: 8018
Color: Burgundy
